summary: Dedupe model events via MIN(aircraft_idx) subquery so multi-aircraft events surface once.
reason: The original join over event_aircraft produced one row per matching aircraft, double-counting events like a mid-air between two Cessna 172s in both ModelCounts and the returned Events slice. Follow-up note: the first version of this patch built args as [match, filters, pick, limit] which mismatched the SQL's placeholder order (pick subquery is in the JOIN, before the WHERE) — any --since/--until/--state filter then silently bound to the wrong placeholder. Corrected order is [pick, match, filters, limit].
